themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "And he made chains, as in the oracle, and put them on the heads of the pillars; and made an h...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיַּ֜עַשׂ: he made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 8 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And he made the most holy house, the length whereof was according to the breadth of the house...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 8 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: וַיַּ֙עַשׂ֙: And he made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 10 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And in the most holy house he made two cherubims of image work, and overlaid them with gold....

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 10 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: וַיַּ֜עַשׂ: he made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application

themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And in the most holy house he made two cherubims of image work, and overlaid them with gold....". Cross references echo "Holy".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 4 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And the porch that was in the front of the house, the length of it was according to the bread...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 4 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: טָהֽוֹר׃: with pure - pure (in a physical, chemical, ceremonial or moral sense)

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 8 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And he made the most holy house, the length whereof was according to the breadth of the house...

themes.label: Righteousness
themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And in the most holy house he made two cherubims of image work, and overlaid them with gold....". Cross references echo "Holy".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 8 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And he made the most holy house, the length whereof was according to the breadth of the house...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 8 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: הַקֳּדָשִׁ֔ים: holy - a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 10 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And in the most holy house he made two cherubims of image work, and overlaid them with gold....

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And he began to build in the second day of the second month, in the fourth year of his reign....". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 2 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And he began to build in the second day of the second month, in the fourth year of his reign....

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 2 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: לְמַלְכוּתֽוֹ׃: of his reign - a rule; concretely, a dominion
